items.step: Harden coder contract to TK-native authoring boundaries
Add reducer and feedback agent contracts
Wire reducer/feedback/fixer roles in codex/config.toml
Run config validation proof and report outcomes
Author mesh failure taxonomy reference
Author completion gates reference
Author team protocol, adjudication fallback, and coder rubric references
Link new references in mesh SKILL and align terminology
Run mesh docs validation proof and close wave
Lock deckset contract and artifact map
Scaffold deckset skill skeleton
Implement runtime refresh script
Author SKILL.md workflow and guardrails
Generate and align agents/openai.yaml
Seed and structure references cache
Run validation and refresh smoke checks
Prepare execution ledger and close wave
Implement mesh streaming replacement cutover (phase 0-5 docs/config/contracts)
Harden seq option parsing and command validation
Implement session-prompts target resolution
Extend messages parser with skill-block stripping
Replace session-prompts stub with real prompt-view behavior
Align seq help and dotfiles seq skill docs
Run proof bundle and close seq prompt wave
Implement fixed-point-driver coordinator subtree and root-mailbox workaround

proof.command: spawn_agent proof_coordinator smoke
proof.evidence_ref: list_agents showed /root/proof_coordinator last_task_message leaked raw <subagent_notification> with Echo before coordinator aggregation

items.step: Run validation bundle and root-output proof check for the coordinator workaround

proof.command: root-output gate
proof.evidence_ref: Coordinator-root smoke failed: leaked raw <subagent_notification> and Echo in direct child output

items.step: Commit, push, and report closure receipts with current-turn learnings
step=wire CLI flag; owner=implementer; success_criteria=`seq token-usage --help` documents `--audit` and unsupported commands reject it.
step=add audit collector; owner=implementer; success_criteria=raw bounded token-count events produce duplicate/reset/null/missing-total counters before dedupe.
step=integrate output rows; owner=implementer; success_criteria=summary audit enriches one row and grouped audit appends one `row_kind=audit` row after bucket trimming.
step=add deterministic tests; owner=implementer; success_criteria=fixtures prove duplicate-last overcount, reset handling, all output modes, and non-audit compatibility.
step=update `$seq` docs; owner=implementer; success_criteria=skill shows `--audit` examples and states local-corpus-not-billing scope.

step=validate locally; owner=implementer; success_criteria=`zig build test`, relevant golden tests, `zig build bench -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -- --config perf/frozen/workload_config.json`, and real `~/.codex/sessions` audit run pass.

step=release; owner=implementer; success_criteria=next `seq` patch tag, successful release workflow, Homebrew formula update, strict audit, upgrade/test, installed `seq --version`, and installed `token-usage --audit` proof.
step=implement_cli_contract; owner=skills-zig implementer; success_criteria=`parse-arch collect` always emits stable read-depth fields and focused runs report `focused`.
step=extend_eval_suite; owner=skills-zig implementer; success_criteria=eval cases assert verdict/classes/suggestions and fail on regression.
step=local_build_proof; owner=skills-zig implementer; success_criteria=build/test/eval plus `.dotfiles` and `skills-zig` smoke checks pass using `./zig-out/bin/parse-arch`.
step=delete_dotfiles_helper; owner=.dotfiles implementer; success_criteria=helper file removed, docs/prompts use raw CLI, quick_validate passes, no helper references remain.
step=release_parse_arch_020; owner=release implementer; success_criteria=`parse-arch-v0.2.0` assets published for Darwin arm64 and Linux x86_64.
step=update_homebrew_tap; owner=tap implementer; success_criteria=formula version/SHA updated and brew audit/test/upgrade plus installed field smoke pass.
Add shared CAS hook policy model
Add Codex launch/config wiring for CAS hook policy
Add CAS hook support preflight and classifier
Add CAS hook accumulator and JSON output
Wire hook policy across all CAS lanes
Validate CAS hook support locally
items.notes: Validation complete. Proof: zig build test-cas; zig build build-cas -Doptimize=ReleaseFast; CAS help surfaces expose --hooks; cas skill quick_validate; git diff --check in skills-zig and .dotfiles; live cas_instance_runner --hooks off passed over managed websocket; live cas_smoke_check --hooks off passed; temp CODEX_HOME UserPromptSubmit probe with cas_smoke_check --hooks require-observed observed hook/started and hook/completed with failureCode null; no app-server or CAS orphan processes remain.

items.step: Release CAS hook support and publish Homebrew tap
items.notes: Release complete. skills-zig commit 0c24d83ec343ba5ee1f32b38b5a83b145f97350b pushed to main; tag cas-v0.2.28 pushed; Release cas runs 25031201695 and 25031209698 passed; final release assets: cas-v0.2.28-darwin-arm64.tar.gz sha256 d0872955ea3237bc28e97ddda8e563a15e95bfa28e7238515ae33be70c380056, cas-v0.2.28-linux-x86_64.tar.gz sha256 7ad61bc9c6ccd56d5c7b75795b88794a7fa3c9dab33976ff9b5292e31896a855; homebrew-tap commit 49bdd8a pushed; brew update, HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_FROM_API=1 brew audit --strict tkersey/tap/cas, brew upgrade tkersey/tap/cas, brew test tkersey/tap/cas passed; installed cas and all companion binaries report 0.2.28; installed help surfaces expose --hooks; installed cas_smoke_check --hooks off, cas_instance_runner --hooks off, and temp CODEX_HOME require-observed hook smoke passed.

items.step: Initialize durable auto-skill execution plan

proof.command: st add/set-status task import
proof.evidence_ref: st tasks st-923..st-928 added and mirrored to update_plan

items.step: Scaffold codex/skills/auto skill files

proof.command: create codex/skills/auto files and chmod command scripts
proof.evidence_ref: required auto skill files created; command scripts executable

items.step: Implement auto helper library and workflow commands

proof.command: bash -n scripts; auto-scan/status/optimize-one/bootstrap smokes; corpus validation
proof.evidence_ref: fixed printf bug; auto-bootstrap-policies --dry-run, auto-scan, auto-status, protected/weak optimize-one rejections, auto-validate-corpus pass

items.step: Run fixed-point review and repair pass

proof.command: fixed-point root review plus specialist transport-invalid handling
proof.evidence_ref: found and fixed bootstrap printf bug; hardened dirty-overlap and no-op finalize guards; corpus validation and diff check pass; specialist packets timed out and were rejected transport-invalid

items.step: Validate auto skill and corpus gates

proof.command: bash -n auto scripts; auto-validate-corpus; auto workflow smokes; git diff --check
proof.evidence_ref: validated_skills=52 failures=0; protected/weak/no-op optimize-one guards rejected; no .autoupdate/auto report paths

items.step: Ship validated auto skill PR

proof.command: git push -u origin auto/add-auto-skill; gh pr create --base main --head auto/add-auto-skill
proof.evidence_ref: PR #34 opened at https://github.com/tkersey/dotfiles/pull/34; branch auto/add-auto-skill pushed at 0e0da50

items.step: Guard baseline and branch state for seq workflow analytics campaign

proof.command: git status/branch/HEAD + zig version + build step inventory
proof.evidence_ref: skills-zig branch seq/workflow-analytics at 660a8594; .dotfiles branch seq/workflow-analytics at a2a8ea8 with pre-existing codex/config.toml unstaged; Zig 0.16.0; seq build/test steps available

items.step: Extend seq query spec with join parsing and validation

proof.command: zig build test-seq --summary none
proof.evidence_ref: JoinSpec parsing and query join fixture compile/pass; stderr contains expected negative-option tests

items.step: Implement seq query join execution and collection integration

proof.command: zig build test-seq --summary none
proof.evidence_ref: join execution and workflow-audit fixture pass

items.step: Add session-derived workflow_signals dataset

proof.command: zig build test-seq --summary none
proof.evidence_ref: workflow_signals fixture strips skill blocks, emits workflow/outcome/tool/session-graph signal kinds

items.step: Add seq workflow-audit command and stable outputs

proof.command: zig build test-seq --summary none
proof.evidence_ref: workflow-audit command fixture, command parse coverage, markdown report output, workdir cohort filtering

items.step: Update CLI help, README, and dotfiles seq skill guidance

proof.command: zig build test-seq --summary none; uv run --with pyyaml -- python3 codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py codex/skills/seq
proof.evidence_ref: apps/seq README documents workflow-audit/workflow_signals/joins; dotfiles seq skill validates; corpus validator also reached seq as valid before unrelated spec-pipeline failure

items.step: Run fixed-point review challenge and remediate findings

proof.command: zig fmt --check apps/seq/src/commands/mod.zig apps/seq/src/lib.zig apps/seq/src/tests.zig apps/seq/src/types/spec.zig && zig build test-seq --summary none
proof.evidence_ref: focused fixed-point challenge: report mode now uses workflowAuditQueryForMode; regression limit check added

items.step: Run full validation bundle for seq workflow analytics

proof.command: zig build build-seq -Doptimize=ReleaseFast --summary none; zig build test-seq --summary none; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0; zig build test --summary none; zig build --summary none; seq live workflow-audit/query smokes; quick_validate seq; git diff --check; st assert-projection
proof.evidence_ref: Zig 0.16.0; live workflow-audit summary/report and query join completed over ~/.codex/sessions since 2026-04-19; projection ok

items.step: Ship validated seq workflow analytics PR
